授業目的: The objective of this course is to deepen the understandings of international economies and to obtain analytical skills from the viewpoint of economics.
到達目標: 1. Students understand a basic theory of international trade2. Students understand some economic issues in real world systematically and comprehensively3. Students are able to collect data from UNCTAD database4. Students are able to formalize idea, write a report, and make a presentation
特記事項: 【合併】International Trade（総合政策学部）/国際貿易論（総合政策学部）
関連科目: ミクロ経済学, Basic economics

第1回:
[Startup Week] Online class (on-demand format)/《90 min》Course guidance.
https://kwansei.jp.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=bb8e81a4-0e95-4c38-ab28-b41e005f71e8
第2回: [Core Week ➀] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Microeconomics 1: Consumer’s behavior and demand curve
第3回: [Core Week ②] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Microeconomics 2: Producer’s behavior and supply curve
第4回: [Core Week ③] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Microeconomics 3: Economic analyses using supply and demand curves
第5回: [Core Week ④] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Benefits of trade and costs of tariff: Does free trade benefit a small country, and how, and whom?
第6回: [Core Week ⑤] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Benefits of trade: What are the consequences between large countries?
第7回: [Core Week ⑥] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Costs of tariff: Are tariffs beneficial for an importing (large) country, and why?
第8回: [Flex Hours] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》In-class midterm examination
第9回: [Core Week ⑦] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Reginal Trade Agreements (RTAs): Why have the RTAs increased rapidly across the world, how about Japan, and what are expected and real impacts of the Japan-EU EPA?
第10回: [Core Week ⑧] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Infrastructure export: What is infrastructure export?, why important, and what are determinants?
第11回: [Core Week ⑨] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》China's Belt and Road Initiative (BRI):　What is BRI, how impactful, and what are implications for Japan?
第12回: [Core Week ⑩] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Aid-for-Trade (AfT): Why is exporting from low income country so poor, and does AfT help solve the problems?
第13回: [Core Week ⑪] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Trade and employment
第14回: [Core Week ⑫] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Access to UNCTAD database
第15回: [Classes and Examinations Period] Week 1 (Face-to-face class)/ 《90 min》In-class presentation

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1
※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: Students are evaluated by accuracy for each question.
成績評価Grading2: Students are evaluated by accuracy, depth of thinking, and creativity.
成績評価Grading3: プレゼンテーション・発表／Presentation (07)
Students are evaluated by clarity, depth of understanding, and oral expression.

name: 【200】International Trade／International Trade
